title: More Variants
description: Adds more variants of Armor, tools, weapons And more into the game with only just a datapack and resourcepack!
body:
### Why would someone want to download this mod?
This Datapacks Aims to Overhaul Most of minecrafts Features! Ranging anywhere from Biomes to armor
A full list of stuff is Below, will be updated every version Update

**IF THERE ARE ANY BUGS PLEASE LET ME KNOW VIA EITHER MY TWITTER DMS (@kitawa_) OR VIA THE GITHUB (coming soon)**
<details>
<summary>Things Added As of 1.0.0 and Before</summary>


<details>
<summary>Armors</summary>


<details>
<summary>Player Armors</summary>

- Copper Armor
- Emerald Armor
- Armadillo Scute Helmet

</details>


<details>
<summary>Horse Armors</summary>

- Copper Horse Armor
- Chainmail Horse Armor
- Emerald Horse Armor
- Netherite Horse Armor

</details>


<details>
<summary>Wolf Armors</summary>

- Leather Wolf Armor
- Iron Wolf Armor
- Copper Wolf Armor
- Chainmail Wolf Armor
- Golden Wolf Armor
- Diamond Wolf Armor
- Emerald Wolf Armor
- Netherite Wolf Armor
- Turtle Scute Wolf Armor

</details>

<details>
<summary>Elytras</summary>

- Leather Glider
- Iron Elytra
- Copper Elytra
- Chainmail Elytra
- Golden Elytra
- Diamond Elytra
- Emerald Elytra
- Netherite Elytra

</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Tools</summary>


<details>
<summary>Swords</summary>

- Copper Sword
- Emerald Sword

</details>

<details>
<summary>Shovels</summary>

- Copper Shovel
- Emerald Shovel

</details>

<details>
<summary>Pickaxes</summary>

- Copper Pickaxe
- Emerald Pickaxe

</details>

<details>
<summary>Axes</summary>

- Copper Axe
- Emerald Axe

</details>

<details>
<summary>Hoes</summary>

- Copper Hoe
- Emerald Hoe

</details>

<details>
<summary>Maces</summary>

- Wooden Mace
- Stone Mace
- Iron Mace
- Copper Mace
- Golden Mace
- Diamond Mace
- Emerald Mace
- Netherite Mace

</details>

<details>
<summary>Shears</summary>

- Wooden Shears
- Stone Shears
- Copper Shears
- Golden Shears
- Diamond Shears
- Emerald Shears
- Netherite Shears

</details>

<details>
<summary>Brushes</summary>

- Wooden Brush
- Stone Brush
- Iron Brush
- Golden Brush
- Diamond Brush
- Emerald Brush
- Netherite Brush

</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Enchantments</summary>

<details>
<summary>Auto Smelt</summary>

- Makes it so if the too enchanted with it mines a block it gived the smelted resault of that block, if the block can't be smelted then it acts as if the tool were not enchanted

</details>


<details>
<summary>Divine Protection</summary>

- Can only be found in Ancient Cities
- is as rare as an enchanted golden apples in Ancient Cities

<details>
<summary>Protects Players from all Damage Sources except the following</summary>

- Void
- Generic Kill (the /kill command)

</details>



</details>

<details>
<summary>Regeneration</summary>

- Gives the Regeneration Effect indefinately with an amplifier corresponding to the enchantment level

</details>


<details>
<summary>Sculk Speed</summary>

- New Boot Enchantment
- Allows any Entity Enchanted with it to move faster on Sculk Blocks which are controlled by a Block Tag 

</details>

<details>
<summary>Sharp Claws</summary>

- New Wolf Armor Enchantment
- Acts Like Sharpness but for Wolves

</details>

<details>
<summary>Swift Hit</summary>

- New Weapon Enchantment
- Increases Attack Speed by 1 on Level one
- Adds an additional 1.5 Attack Speed Bonus For every Level after Level 1

</details>

<details>
<summary>Water Breathing</summary>

- New Helmet Enchantment
- Gives the Entity with the enchantment 5 seconds of water breathing per level of the enchantment

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Curses</summary>

<details>
<summary>Curse of Fragility</summary>

- New Durability Curse
- Works as the Opposite of Unbreaking

</details>

<details>
<summary>Curse of Sacrification</summary>

- New Weapon/Shield Curse
- If held in either mainhand or offhand of an entity, when that entity is dealt with a killing blow the item will be usedup and will be grant the Entity another chance of survival
- any item enchanted acts like a Totem of Undying

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Trims</summary>


<details>
<summary>Trim Patterns</summary>

No New Patterns

</details>

<details>
<summary>Trimmable Tools/Armors</summary>

- Horse Armors
- Wolf Armors
- Elytras

</details>

<details>
<summary>Trim Materials</summary>

- Blaze Rod
- Breeze Rod
- Glow Stone Dust
- Nether Brick
- Prismarine
- Shulker Shell

</details>

</details>

</details>


<details>
<summary>Things Altered/Changed As of 1.0.0 and Before</summary>


<details>
<summary>Renamed the Following</summary>

- Wolf Armor -> Armadillo Scute Wolf Armor
- Shears -> Iron Shears
- Brush -> Copper Brush

</details>


<details>
<summary>Altered the following Enchantments</summary>


<details>
<summary>Channeling</summary>

- Channeling can now be put on a mace
- When a Mace has the Channeling Enchantment it always strikes with Lightning

</details>


<details>
<summary>Armor Enchantments</summary>


<details>
<summary>Blast Protection</summary>


<details>
<summary>Is now compatable with the following Enchantments</summary>

- Fire Protection
- Projectile Protecion
- Protection

</details>


</details>

<details>
<summary>Fire Protection</summary>


<details>
<summary>Is now compatable with the following Enchantments</summary>

- Blast Protection
- Projectile Protecion
- Protection

</details>


</details>

<details>
<summary>Projectile Protection</summary>


<details>
<summary>Is now compatable with the following Enchantments</summary>

- Blast Protection
- Fire Protection
- Protecion

</details>


</details>

<details>
<summary>Protection</summary>


<details>
<summary>Is now compatable with the following Enchantments</summary>

- Blast Protection
- Fire Protection
- Projectile Protecion

</details>


</details>

- All Armor Enchantments can now be used on Horse Armor, Wolf Armor, and Elytras
- 

</details>

<details>
<summary>Wind Burst</summary>

- When a Mace is enchanted with the Wind Burst Enchantment it activates upon hitting an entitiy even when you are on the ground

</details>

</details>

<details>
<summary>Altered the following Items</summary>


<details>
<summary>Wolf Armor</summary>

- Wolf Armor now has 128 Durability as Leather Wolf Armor now is the defult 64 Durability

</details>


<details>
<summary>The Mace</summary>

- The Mace now has more Durability and more Attack Damage as to make it not useless to go to a Trial Chamber

</details>


<details>
<summary>Brush</summary>

- The Brush now has More durability to be more inline with the other tools in the game

</details>

<details>
<summary>Shears</summary>

- Shears now has More durability to be more inline with the other tools in the game

</details>

<details>
<summary>Wind Charges</summary>

- Wind Charges are now instant Projectiles, like snowballs
- No Item Use Cooldown

</details>

</details>

</details>
<details>
<summary>Work In Progress (WIP) Features!</summary>

<details>
<summary>Armor Types</summary>

<details>
<summary>Plate Armor</summary>

- Plate Armor will come in two types, Wood and Stone

</details>
<details>
<summary>Shulker Shell/Popped Chorus Fruit Armor</summary>

- Allows any entity wearing the ENTIRE set to be immune to Projectile Damage
- Will Come in all 16 Colors

</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Structure Types</summary>

<details>
<summary>Bastions</summary>

<details>
<summary>Maze</summary>

- Is a Maze type Bastion
- Has a Gigantic Maze as the center piece

</details>

</details>
<details>
<summary>Piglin Outpost</summary>

- Crimson
- Warped
- Will add more varients for mods that add more varients of nether wood

</details>
<details>
<summary>Mineshafts</summary>

- There Will be A Mineshaft for every type of wood Except the nether woods

</details>
</details>
</details>
<details>
<summary>Known Bugs</summary>

- The Resourcepack contains another resourcepack of mine created for personal use (only edits the vanilla planks and that's it) It is expected to be removed in an upcoming version of the Resourcepack
- The Custom Mace Recipies are not Given through advancements This is expected to be Fixed in an upcoming version of the Datapack

</details>
